releaseNotes: • Player: the aspect-ratio button still cycles Fit / Stretch / Crop on each tap, but the icon stays the same — the 1.35.3 attempt to swap icons and tooltips per mode was defeated by media_kit's controls theme caching the button bar at mount. The 3-state cycle still works (the video frame changes immediately on tap); only the per-mode icon and tooltip were reverted. You can tell which mode is active by looking at the video frame.
